title: Better Than Farming
description: An agriculture and food overhaul mod for Better Than Adventure
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!_

_For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

## About
Better Than Farming aims to add many features to the base game that expands the farming and food making part of the game. Some features are inspired by [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).
## Installation
This mod needs a specific [MultiMC/Prism](https://github.com/Turnip-Labs/babric-instance-repo) instance to run and other mods as a dependencies:
## Requires
- [Halplibe](https://modrinth.com/mod/halplibe) 
- [Terrain-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrainapi)
- [Catalyst (Core and effects)](https://modrinth.com/mod/catalyst)
- [DragonFly](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragonfly-model-library)

## [Credits](https://github.com/DundiGundi/BetterThanFarming/blob/Master/src/main/resources/credits.txt)
